input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OGNL has optional SecurityManager support controlled by `ognl.security.manager`; tests that opt into or install a SecurityManager are risky on newer JDKs such as JDK 25 and are not required for normal meaningful coverage.
Tests that deliberately perform deep reflection into JDK internals may need module-opening JVM args, but normal OGNL usage against application POJOs does not require extra setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL 3.3.5 is an in-process Java expression/object-graph navigation library; meaningful coverage is reachable with ordinary POJO expression parsing/get/set/invocation tests. Its required Javassist runtime dependency is already declared transitively by the resolved artifact, and documentation does not indicate any required external service, Docker image, or mandatory environment/system property.
